title: Junior Business Development Manager at Aparna Constructions

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Aparna Constructions
jsonLd.description:
Aparna Constructions has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aparna Constructions:
Aparna Constructions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aparna Constructions!
